Oracc: SAAo/SAA08 — Astrological Reports to Assyrian Kings

SAA 08 240. Birth Omens (CT 27 028) [terrestrial][via saao/saa08]

Obverse
o 1o 1

BE iz-bu 02-ma SAG.DU-su-nu 01-ma

(1) If the anomalies are double, and they have only one head and two s[pines], and two tails, but only one belly: one will rule the land which two [ru]led.

Reverse
r 1r 1

BE iz-[bu x x x x x] ⸢x⸣ i-man-du

(r 1) If an ano[maly ......]... will become many; [the prince's land] will revolt against him.

r 22

[NUN KUR-su] BAL-su

blank

traces of a name

(r 3) [From NN].

Adapted from Hermann Hunger, Astrological Reports to Assyrian Kings (State Archives of Assyria, 8), 1992. Lemmatised by Mikko Luukko, 2016-17, as part of the research programme of the Alexander von Humboldt Chair in the Ancient History of the Near and Middle East at LMU Munich (Karen Radner, Humboldt Professorship 2015). The annotated edition is released under the Creative Commons Attribution Share-Alike license 3.0. Please cite this page as http://oracc.org/saao/P336145/.
